<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Readline; /** * ReadlineAware interface. * * This interface is used to pass the Shell's readline implementation into * commands which depend on it. */ interface ReadlineAware { /** * Set the Readline service. */ public function setReadline(Readline $readline); }
